problem id: fd15ed49
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11110111 -> 11010011
  01011000 -> 10100110
  01000111 -> 10011111
  11111010 -> 11001010
  10000000 -> 00100000
  01101000 -> 11001010
  10110001 -> 01001110
  11000111 -> 10111111
  01100111 -> 11010111

query: 00000010
predicted answer: 00000100
